programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: TBH 217
programme.desc: TBH 217

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S06E24
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S06E24

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: A town Marshal despite the disagreements of his newlywed bride and the townspeople around him must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon when the gang leader an outlaw he sent up years ago arrives on the noon train

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Lambert has the stagecoach wrecked killing the Commissioner so his phony replacement can alter Coonskins land survey When Red Ryder exposes the survey hoax Lambert has his stooge Sheriff put Red in jail

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Distant Drums
programme.desc: Distant Drums

programme.title: Round up Time in Texas
programme.desc: Gene and Frog arrive with a herd of horses for Genes brother a diamond prospector whose work has attracted the interest of a bunch of bad guys

programme.desc: A jittery airline heir Brett Cullen finds himself on a flight to hell Meanwhile a stewardess Lezlie Deane goes home with a charming passenger Ted Demers who may be too good to be true

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An insurance salesman murders an obnoxious tycoon to get his seductive wife and his fortune but later is blackmailed by a rival

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Amateur ventriloquist Billy Goldman learns that being a ventriloquist might not be the best career for him

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A fast food owner has only one goal in life - to utterly destroy and humiliate his competition However he gets a taste of his own medicine

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: A fashion designer demands too much from his model which leads to her suicide This gets all those hed wronged to seek revenge

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks the werewolf Janos Skorzeny to Hollywood where Skorzeny has been killing prostitutes But Eric is mistaken for the killer

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: On Halloween Eric sees the pentagram appear on his hand and knows his transformation into a werewolf is imminent He locks himself in an abandoned house not realizing that a disfigured recluse still lives there

programme.title: Forever Knight

programme.title: Hogans 230
programme.desc: Hogans 230

programme.title: Hogans 304
programme.desc: Hogans 304

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton begins to regret having so harshly punished the 73 Crew when McHale and The Boys - While in the process of trying to rid their island of a bothersome bird - Give The Captain the impression that they are out to get even

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton accuses Parker of cowardice after Parker loses his cool during the pursuit of a Japanese patrol boat But Parker redeems himself when - After a little pep-talk from McHale - He orchestrates the destruction of a German U-Boat on a mission to rendezvous with a Japanese patrol

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter tries to make Gomer dislike him before graduation feeling that he hasnt done his job correctly if he isnt hated by ALL the recruits Sgt Carter asks for a transfer to California but things dont go quite as he expects

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While in town on pass Sgt Carter decides to play a joke on Gomer by setting him on a quest to get a kiss from The Dragon Lady but in order for it to work he will need Dukes help

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A mad scientist invites the castaways to his island where he hopes to conduct strange experiments on them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Howells discover that they are not legally married But as The Skipper prepares to marry them in the lagoon a fight causes them to call off the wedding altogether

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke convince Kate to enter a local merchants Mrs Homemaker Contest when they realize that the first prize of 50 in merchandise would almost exactly cover the cost of the new gun theyve been admiring

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke convince Kate to enter a local merchants Mrs Homemaker Contest when they realize that the first prize of 50 in merchandise would almost exactly cover the cost of the new gun theyve been admiring

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: When teenagers are turning into zombies Max and 99 go after their idol the Groovy Guru

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Thinking that a list of KAOS agents is Maxs little black book Max and his old Army buddy get dates with a couple of KAOS agents

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: The college students who hire BJ to haul equipment for a talent show secretly plan to his rig as a gambling casino

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget and Penny are in Italy However Cheif Quimby gives Gadget an assignment It tells him that DrClaw is planning on stealing a priceless artifact known as the Golden Pizza However Gadget has to join an opera to find and stop the MAD agents from stealing the Golden Pizza Plus another agent is planning to use his singing plant to help DrClaw steal the Pizza Gadget must stop DrClaw from stealing the Golden Pizza and destroy the singing plant

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD may try to use a powerful sneezing weapon against Metro City

programme.title: Breakthrough
programme.desc: In 1944 a German sergeant gets involved in an anti-Hitler conspiracy and saves the life of an American colonel

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: While exploring a cavern in an asteroid the Alphans release Balor a sadistic alien who has achieved immortality

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke are skinny-dipping in a local pond when two pool hustlers steal both the cousins clothing and the General Lee Rosco soon pursues who he thinks are the Duke boys but the crooks drive the stolen General Lee into the lake When nobody is found with the car Rosco tearfully announces that Bo and Luke have drowned Bo and Luke arrive home safe and sound then learn that Boss has used their alleged deaths to implicate them on the theft of his gold watch so he can fraudulently collect the insurance money The Duke boys and Cooter concoct a scheme to turn the General Lee into a ghost and haunt Boss and Rosco until they admit their scheme

programme.title: Hercules 217
programme.desc: Hercules 217

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: With a reporter on board the Taelon mother ship is highjacked into interdimensional space Liam is the prime suspect causing an even bigger rift between Daan and Zoor As the ship floats lost in space they must find the real culprit

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: To escape capture an alien merges with a pregnant woman This causes unexpected consequences for the aliens and for Blackwoods team - and violence for the hospital staff when the womanalien goes into labor

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing encounters Falco who has come to kill Dr Arcane for turning him from a bird into a man

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble is deputized to transport a suspected killer of a man and his wife to the county seat along with witnesses who want to lynch the prisoner

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: An outlaw gang leader orders his men to kidnap a teacher so he can learn to read and write for a special purpose His men nab Victoria by mistake-she pretends to be the school marm to buy time for the Barkley boys to find her

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Keller goes undercover as a USAF officer to investigate a womans murder that might involve a USAF Colonel

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rogosh is an operative for a country hostile to the United States When he strikes he typically leaves dozens if not hundreds of bodies in his wake Rogosh has been spotted in Los Angeles But he will not crack under normal interrogation methods Briggs comes up with an unusual plan The IMF stages an accident where pedestrian Rogosh is struck by a car When he awakes he appears to be in a prison in his home country -- three years later

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: fter work Joe Friday goes by a laundromat to buy cigarettes He interrupts a burglar stealing from the coin box and shots are fired The burglar dies and Friday is investigated by the shooting board to see if it is a justified shot

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A man is forcing different young women to help him rob banks and Friday and Gannon have to find out who he is and stop him

programme.title: The Black Tent

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Bail Out
programme.desc: A sleazy bail bondsman thinks he has finally gotten his big break when a millionaire heiress gets busted with drug dealers If she shows up in court it could mean a million dollars to him If she doesnt he could be ruined When the deal gets too complicated he hires a playboy bounty hunter to keep an eye on his investment But who is going to keep an eye on him

programme.title: The Hitman
programme.desc: A Cop goes undercover as a Hitman to bring down a criminal organization

programme.title: Woman Of Straw
programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune

programme.title: What A Way To Go
programme.desc: A four-time widow discusses her four marriages in which all of her husbands became incredibly rich and died prematurely because of their drive to be rich

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: The Flight Of The Phoenix
programme.desc: After an oil company plane crashes in the Sahara the survivors are buoyed with hope by one of the passengers an airplane designer who plans for them to build a flyable plane from the wreckage

programme.desc: Georgina van der Linden v. Samantha Van Doorn

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Zach Darling v. Jason Diep

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Wisniewski’s development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Harry Davies v. Evgeny Belovs

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Cory Knipe has been a professional MMA fighter since 2010. One of his biggest challenges has been to learn to effectively balance work and his MMA training. At HK36, he is up against heavy hitter Anton Tokarchuk in the Light Heavyweight Co-Main event.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Jenn Wolstenholme

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda.

programme.desc: James Saville v. Martin Sheridan

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Harry Davies v. Evgeny Belovs

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 46 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the exhilarating amateur matchup of Jiu Jitsu athlete Colton Boxell vs. Boxer Mac Laursen. programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The April Taylor Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the lady whose upcoming celebrity tell all book will blow your mind Meet the lovely Ms April Taylor

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Sean Kanan Interview

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Presto accidentally transports his friends to a faraway place where they face an enormous danger literally Now he must climb to the new heights of courage and master his magic to save the others

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids are adopted by a loving caravan leader who is searching for his daughter who was abducted by a demon

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget must protect the Poot-Ta-Foots treasure

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The Police ask Gadget to investigate a series of robberies that they believe MAD are behind

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades beam the Guardians into a parallel universe where the unwitting Leader-1 and Scooter fight evil Guardians and ally with the good Cy-Kill Crasher and Cop-Tur

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Steamer defects to the Guardians but theyre suspicious when he reveals Cy-Kills new scheme to overthrow Earth

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce hears a rumour planted by Saw Boss that Audric is aboard the Edro Life ship a ship that is capable of carrying entire civilisations to new galaxies Jayce is able to get aboard the ship by steering the Pride through the thrusters energy flow

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The Lightning League lands on a desert planet with no plant life assuming that is where Audric would be They are mistakenly led by a mirage of Audric to try and rescue him but they are attacked by the native nomads who have been tricked

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: A millionaire has hired VENOM to steal a machine that can cause ultra sonic vibrations The millionaire wants to become vice president of the Netherlands and if his demands are not met he will destroy all of Hollands dykes He only wanted to bluff -- too bad Mayhem never bluffs

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM steals the famous Lippizaner Stallions earning 4 million in platinum bars from an Arab At the end VENOM loses the money by a laser shot from Shark and they all quickly flee in Piranha
